blocks.name: Diver Body
blocks.maskDescription: Combined mass, buoyancy, and hydrodynamic drag for a human body on a position-based translational port. Weight, Archimedes buoyancy, and quadratic drag are all applied as body forces through the port.

blocks.name: Gas Branch
blocks.maskDescription: Two-port gas branch base class. Provides ports A and B with pressure difference and molar flow.

blocks.name: Ambient Reference
blocks.maskDescription: Ambient pressure reference (infinite source/sink). Computes ambient pressure from depth via translational port position.

blocks.name: BCD Bladder
blocks.maskDescription: Flexible variable-volume accumulator with buoyancy force output. Internal pressure equals ambient (flexible walls). Volume = n*R*T/P_amb, clamped to V_max. Applies buoyancy force through position-based translational port.

blocks.name: BCD Inflate Valve
blocks.maskDescription: Commanded valve for BCD inflation. Opens when cmd > 0.5, allowing IP gas to flow into bladder.

blocks.name: Exhale Valve
blocks.maskDescription: One-way check valve for exhaled gas. Opens when upstream pressure exceeds downstream by P_crack.

blocks.name: First Stage Regulator
blocks.maskDescription: Reduces HP tank pressure to intermediate pressure. Maintains outlet (B) at P_amb + IP_offset, limited by supply pressure.

blocks.name: Gas Domain Properties
blocks.maskDescription: Sets domain-wide parameters (R_gas, T) for the connected gas network.

blocks.name: Gas Tank
blocks.maskDescription: High-pressure gas reservoir (rigid tank) with weight force output. Pressure follows ideal gas law: P = n*R*T/V Applies gas weight force through translational port (decreases as tank empties).

blocks.name: Gas Volume
blocks.maskDescription: Small rigid gas volume providing pressure state for intermediate nodes. P = n*R*T/V (ideal gas in rigid container)

blocks.name: Ideal Molar Flow Source
blocks.maskDescription: Injects a specified molar flow rate into port A (from ambient). Single-port: flow enters from environment at ambient conditions.

blocks.name: Ideal Pressure Source
blocks.maskDescription: Sets port pressure to commanded value. Supplies/absorbs any molar flow.

blocks.name: Lungs
blocks.maskDescription: Variable-volume lung chamber. Directly constrains lung volume to the commanded input. Calculates internal pressure using the ideal gas law.

blocks.name: Overpressure Relief Valve (OPRV)
blocks.maskDescription: Passive dump valve that vents gas when BCD internal pressure exceeds ambient by the cracking threshold (typically 2.5-4.0 psi gauge).

blocks.name: Purge Valve
blocks.maskDescription: Commanded dump valve for BCD purge. Opens when cmd > 0.5, vents gas from bladder to ambient. P_dump bias models hydrostatic head from raising dump valve above shoulder. Flow is clamped non-negative (one-way: BCD to water only).

blocks.name: Second Stage Regulator
blocks.maskDescription: Demand valve: opens when downstream pressure drops below P_amb - P_crack. When open, delivers flow to bring downstream back toward P_amb. Flow is proportional to (P_amb - B.p) to provide self-limiting delivery.
